reviews.review_description: a nice game if you like the anime and are interested in japan

reviews.review_title: Mini games are surprisingly fun to play
reviews.review_description:
As you may have already guessed, this game is for the fans of Teasing Master Takagi-san, and if you know nothing about this manga/anime, you better skip this game.

And as a big fan of the manga, I am enjoying the whole experience with Takagi-san in VR. However, I also find the mini-games surprising fun to play. They are all straightforward, but doing it in front of Takagi-san makes the experience somehow more thrilling, and I am sure fellow die-hard Takagi fans can sympathize with it once they experience it themselves.
